# benchmark.tool_status { #tspaint.benchmark.tool_status }

```python
tspaint.benchmark.tool_status()
```

Resolved path + availability for every benchmark tool (incl. RFMix).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`)\[[dict](`dict`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   One row per tool (``rfmix``, ``gnomix``, ``salai``, ``recombmix``) with ``tool`` (name), ``path`` (the resolved binary path or install directory) and ``available`` (bool from :func:`tspaint.benchmark.tool_available`).
